metadata.title: Pratibha Dhingra | Full Stack & React Native Developer
metadata.description: Full Stack and React Native Developer with 3.5+ years of experience building scalable mobile applications and backend systems using React Native, Node.js, FastAPI, and AWS.

hero.name: Pratibha Dhingra
hero.title: Full Stack & React Native Developer
hero.description: 3.5+ years building scalable mobile applications and backend systems — React Native frontends to FastAPI/Node.js APIs and cloud infrastructure. AI integrations, microservices, and CI/CD.

about.label: About Me
about.title: Building scalable mobile & AI
about.paragraph1: I'm a Full Stack and React Native Developer with over 3.5 years of hands-on experience building scalable mobile applications and backend systems. I work across the entire stack — from React Native mobile apps to FastAPI/Node.js microservices and cloud infrastructure.
about.paragraph2: I specialize in AI integrations using OpenAI GPT-4o, building microservices architecture, and implementing CI/CD pipelines. Whether developing cross-platform mobile apps, designing database schemas, or deploying to AWS — I bring the same level of care to every layer.

items.institution: S.S. Jain Subodh Autonomous P.G. College
S.S. Jain Subodh Mahila Mahavidhyalaya College

items.description: Developed cross-platform mobile features using React Native, including deep linking, local state management, and native platform integrations. Built and optimized backend microservices and REST APIs using Python (FastAPI) and Node.js, improving application response times by 35%. Implemented NestJS architectural patterns and CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions and AWS.

Developed frontend components and backend APIs using the MERN stack for web applications. Improved API performance through database query optimization and modular code enhancements across relational and NoSQL databases.

items.title: Route AI
items.description: AI-driven routing mobile and web application for commercial truck drivers, automating optimal path generation based on legal permit uploads using GPT-4o document parsing and real-time navigation.

items.title: SweatJoy
items.description: Live fitness and wellness platform with workout tracking, personalized meal logging, Apple subscription modules, and automated data pipeline with Zoho CRM integration.

items.title: BizBot
items.description: AI-powered enterprise organization chatbot deployed across custom cloud microservices, reducing document retrieval timelines by 40% with optimized PostgreSQL indexing and Redis caching.

items.title: WorthAdvisor
items.description: Financial reporting platform with secure multi-role access control for 200+ production users, featuring CI/CD deployment pipelines using GitHub Actions and AWS Serverless frameworks.

contact.description: I'm currently open to new opportunities. Whether you have a project in mind, want to collaborate, or just want to say hi — my inbox is always open.
